entry.title: Wendy's Debuts New Biggie Deals Value Menu
entry.summary:
Wendy's debuts the new Biggie Deals value menu as a refreshed take that builds on the chain's Biggie Bags, offering options at the $4, $6, and $8 price points. They include:
- $4 Biggie Bites - Choose either a Crispy Chicken Sandwich, a Jr. Cheeseburger, a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, four Chicken Nuggets, or Jr.-sized Fries to pair with either four Chicken Nuggets, Jr.-sized Fries, or a small soft drink. - $6 Biggie Bag - Choose either a Crispy Chicken Sandwich, Jr. Cheeseburger, Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, or Double Stack to go with four Nuggets, Jr. Fries, and a small soft drink. - $8 Biggie Bundle - Choose any two of the following: Crispy Chicken Sandwich, Jr. Cheeseburger, Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, or Double Stack. Jr. Fries and a small soft drink are also included. According to Wendy's, the new Biggie Deals "offers a variety of meal pairings with options fit for all fans, perfect for snacking, meals, late-night cravings, and more." If you're looking to get the most bang for your buck, the Double Stack is generally the most expensive of the available Biggie Deals options, followed by the Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger. Photo via Wendy's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Einstein Bros Offers $8 Breakfast & Brew Deal
entry.summary:
Einstein Bros Bagels is offering a limited-time deal where you can get a Build-Your-Own Egg Sandwich and a large hot or iced coffee for $8.
They're calling it the "$8 Breakfast & Brew." The Build-Your-Own Egg Sandwich lets you choose from either the Pork Sausage & Cheese Egg Sandwich, the Turkey Sausage & Cheese Egg Sandwich, the Bacon & Cheese Egg Sandwich, the Ham & Cheese Egg Sandwich, or the Egg & Cheese Sandwich. Most of the sandwiches listed normally cost $8.49 at my local Einstein Bros here in Los Angeles (the exception being the Egg & Cheese, which is $7.79). The base sandwich comes on a bagel of your choice (with an extra charge for select flavors), one egg (with an additional charge for two eggs or egg whites), and cheese (choose from Cheddar, American, or Swiss). Cold brew and other beverages can be substituted for the brewed coffee, but will cost extra. Photo via Einstein Bros Bagels. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Paris Baguette Goes with Salted Caramel Pretzel for 2025-2026 Winter Menu
entry.summary:
Cafe-bakery chain Paris Baguette features a series of Salted Caramel Pretzel treats to anchor its 2025-2026 winter menu. Here's what the lineup looks like:
Available through March 3, 2026 - - Salted Caramel Pretzel Croissant Crisp - A crispy, pressed croissant covered in salted caramel and topped with pretzel pieces. - Salted Caramel Pretzel Supreme Croissant - A round croissant filled with pastry cream, topped with salted caramel and pretzel pieces. - Salted Caramel Pretzel King Cream Donut - A shell donut filled with custard cream, dipped in salted caramel, and topped with pretzel pieces and powdered sugar. - Salted Caramel Pretzel Tart - Salted caramel and pretzel pieces layered in a buttery tart shell. - Salted Caramel Pretzel Latte - Espresso with salted caramel sauce and milk of choice, drizzled with more caramel and topped with a pretzel. It is available hot or iced. - Salted Caramel Pretzel Cold Brew - Cold brew coffee with salted caramel sauce, topped with sweet cream, caramel drizzle, and a pretzel. - Salted Caramel Pretzel Matcha Latte - Matcha with salted caramel sauce and milk of choice, drizzled with more caramel and topped with a pretzel. The drink is available hot or iced. In addition to the Salted Caramel Pretzel lineup, Paris Baguette also adds two savory dishes: - Quiche Lorraine - A classic French quiche made with bacon, egg, and cheese. - Sourdough Tuna Melt Sandwich - Tuna salad topped with melted American cheese, served on toasted sourdough. Finally, since it's prime football season, Paris Baguette offers two limited-time, football-inspired treats through February 8, 2026: - King Cream Football Donut - A shell donut filled with custard cream and decorated with icing to resemble a football. - Triple Chocolate Football Cream Cake - Chocolate sponge cake layered with chocolate soft cream and chocolate crisp pearls. It's shaped and decorated like a football (available in-cafe Friday through Sunday). Photo via Paris Baguette. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Hardee's Introduces New Brioche Breakfast Sandwiches and Iced Coffees
entry.summary:
Hardee's bolsters its breakfast menu with the launch of new Brioche Breakfast Sandwiches and Iced Coffees. Beer-Battered Fish Sandwiches are also back for a limited time and are being offered at a discounted price of two for $7 at participating locations.
The new sandwiches include the following options: - Bacon, Egg & Cheese Brioche Sandwich - Cherrywood-smoked bacon, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun. - Sausage, Egg & Cheese Brioche Sandwich - A grilled sausage patty, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun. - Super Bacon Brioche Sandwich - Extra cherrywood-smoked bacon, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun. - Super Sausage Brioche Sandwich - Two grilled sausage patties, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun. - Monster Brioche Sandwich -A grilled sausage patty, cherrywood-smoked bacon, thin-sliced ham, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun. Hardee's new iced coffees feature iced coffee with half-and-half, plus either vanilla or caramel syrup. Hardee's Beer-Battered Fish Sandwich features a Redhook beer-battered and fried Alaskan pollock fillet served with shredded lettuce and tartar sauce on a toasted brioche-style bun. Photo via Hardee's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wingstop Welcomes New Hot Honey Trio
entry.summary:
Wingstop expands its hot honey offerings with the launch of its new Hot Honey Trio, which includes the chain's regular Hot Honey Rub joined by two new, limited-time flavors.
Available nationwide now, Wingstop's Hot Honey Trio includes: - Hot Honey Rub - "Sweet honey in a fiery dry rub." - Saucy Sriracha Hot Honey - "Hot honey gets saucy - Sriracha style." - Sweet Garlic Hot Honey - "Sticky-sweet garlic with a spicy kiss." According to Wingstop's heat scale, both Hot Honey Rub and Sweet Garlic Hot Honey measure in at three flames (out of five), while Saucy Sriracha Hot Honey comes in at four flames. As with the rest of the chain's flavors, the Hot Honey Trio can be selected for any of Wingstop's chicken offerings. Photo via Wingstop. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: The Chicken Supreme is Back at Jack in the Box
entry.summary:
The Chicken Supreme is back for a limited time at Jack in the Box. It's joined by new Jibbis collectible bag charms to celebrate the fast-food chain's 75th anniversary.
The Chicken Supreme was first introduced in 1980 and discontinued in 2004. It consists of a crispy-fried chicken patty, Swiss-style cheese, lettuce, tomato, and mayo-onion sauce, served on a toasted wheat bun. A Double version is also available with a second chicken patty and an additional slice of cheese. Pricing for the Chicken Supreme starts at $3.49. A Chicken Supreme combo meal with small fries and a drink starts at $5, while the Double Chicken Supreme combo meal starts at $7. Finally, there's the Double Chicken Supreme Munchie Meal (pictured), which starts at $14. It includes a Double Chicken Supreme, two tacos, seasoned curly fries, and a regular drink. The meal also includes a limited-edition Jibbi bag charm. There are four different Jibbis in all. Here's what they look like:
Photos via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Southern Fried Shrimp and Giant Quesadillas Return to Zaxbys
entry.summary:
Citing popular demand, Zaxbys brings back Southern Fried Shrimp and Giant Quesadillas for a limited time.
Zaxbys' Southern Fried Shrimp is available in three options: - ZaxSeas Surf & Turf Meal - Eight Southern Fried Shrimp, Zax Sauce, three Chicken Fingerz, Texas Toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink. - Southern Fried Shrimp Meal - Eight Southern Fried Shrimp, Zax Sauce, Texas Toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink. - Southern Fried Shrimp Side - Eight shrimp with Zax Sauce. Prices vary, but a location in Atlanta charges $14.99 for the Surf & Turf Meal, $11.49 for the Southern Fried Shrimp Meal, and $6.99 for eight shrimp. There are two Giant Quesadillas to choose from: - Chicken Bacon Ranch Quesadilla - Three hand-breaded Chicken Fingerz, Cheddar Jack cheese, hardwood-smoked bacon, and ranch dressing, folded into a warm flour tortilla. It's served with a side of ranch and a small drink. - Chicken Fajita Quesadilla - Three hand-breaded Chicken Fingerz, Cheddar Jack cheese, grilled onions and peppers, and Southwest Ranch, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. It comes with a side of ranch and a small drink. The same location sells both quesadillas for $11.49 each. Photo via Zaxbys. Read more at Brand Eating!

Selling for a discounted price of $8.95 for a regular size ($16.95 for a Giant), Mike's Hot Italian features ham, salami, and pepperoni grilled and chopped with melted provolone cheese, and then topped with grilled onions, lettuce, tomato, and chopped pepper relish on your choice of bread. entry.title: Chick-fil-A Tests New Cream Cold Brew
entry.summary:
Chick-fil-A is testing new Iced Coffee flavors and new Cream Cold Brew at participating restaurants in the cities of Anniston, Birmingham, and Tuscaloosa in Alabama.
The Iced Coffee is being tested with new Caramel and Mocha flavors in addition to the current Vanilla and Plain options. The new Cream Cold Brew features the chain's cold-brewed coffee (same as its iced coffee) mixed with a sweet cream blend (the chain's milkshake base, according to the ingredients list) and served over ice. Like the Iced Coffee, it is available in Caramel, Mocha, Vanilla, and Plain varieties. The coffee beverage test runs through January 31, 2026, while supplies last. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: McDonald's Updates Extra Value Meal Deals
entry.summary:
McDonald's updates its Extra Value Meal deals by offering the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Meal and the $8 Two Snack Wrap Meal for a limited time at participating locations.
The $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Meal includes a Sausage McMuffin with Egg, Hash Browns, and a small coffee. The $8 Two Snack Wrap Meal includes two Snack Wraps (two Ranch, Two Spicy, or one of each), medium fries, and a medium fountain drink. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Dubai Chocolate Cookies and More
entry.summary:
Crumbl bakes new Dubai Chocolate Cookies as part of this week's rotating dessert menu available from January 19 through January 24, 2026.
The Crumbl offers a rotating menu of four desserts each week, along with a permanent Classic menu. Here's what this week's limited-time options include: - New Dubai Chocolate Cookie (pictured) - A brownie cookie layered with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio filling, finished with milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream. - Brown Sugar Cinnamon Cookie featuring Pop-Tarts - A warm brown sugar cinnamon-stuffed cookie topped with a brown sugar cream cheese glaze and crumbled Pop-Tarts. - Strawberry Crumb Cake Cookie - A buttery strawberry cookie with white drops, topped with a milky glaze and strawberry vanilla streusel. - Peanut Butter & Jelly Cookie - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with swirls of peanut butter mousse and raspberry topping. The cookie bakery chain is also offering Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins on Thursdays only. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

Applebee's welcomes the new O-M-Cheese Burger to kick off 2026.
Priced at a suggested $11.99, the new burger is served in a sizzling skillet with a pool of melted queso and Cheddar cheeses. The burger consists of a beef patty, American cheese, applewood-smoked bacon, and spicy honey mustard on a toasted bun. Classic fries are included on the side. The O-M-Cheese Burger is also featured as an entree option of Applebee's 2 for $25 Menu, alongside Fiesta Lime Chicken and the Oriental Chicken Salad. In addition to the new burger, $6 Mucho Smoocho Sips are back for a limited time. The discounted Valentine's Day-themed cocktails include the Tipsy Cupid and the new Prickly Ever After Rita. They're joined by the new Prickly Melon Rush Mocktail. The Tipsy Cupid features Smirnoff Vodka, orange liqueur, strawberry, and premium lemon sour, garnished with gummy lips. The New Prickly Ever After Rita features Cuervo Tradicional Blanco Tequila, orange liqueur, lime, and prickly pear, garnished with gummy lips. The Prickly Melon Rush Mocktail is a mix of Red Bull Watermelon, prickly pear, lime juice, and lemon lime soda. Photo via Applebee's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New Ham & Three Cheese Melt and More Arrive at Jimmy John's
entry.summary:
Jimmy John's adds the new Ham & Three Cheese Melt as a permanent menu item. The new sandwich is joined by the limited-time return of Kickin' Ranch Chips and Red Velvet Cookies.
Also, the chain is running a limited-time promotion where you can add chips and a drink to any sandwich or wrap purchase for $1. Jimmy John's new Ham & Three Cheese Melt is a toasted sub that features a double portion of ham served with cheddar, provolone, parmesan, and mayo on French bread. Kickin' Ranch Chips are potato chips with a "zesty ranch flavor and bold pepper kick," while the Red Velvet Cookie is made with dark brown sugar, cocoa powder, a hint of vanilla, and sweet white chips. Prices vary, but a regular Ham & Three Cheese Melt costs $11.69 at my local Jimmy John's here in Los Angeles. At the same location, a bag of Kickin' Ranch Chips is $3.29 and a Red Velvet Cookie costs $3.49. Photo via Jimmy John's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Sonic Introduces New $6 All-American Smasher Meal
entry.summary:
Sonic starts off the new year on the value trail with the introduction of the new $6 All-American Smasher Meal for a limited time at participating locations nationwide.
The value-priced combo meal includes:
An All-American Sonic Smasher Medium Tots or Groovy Fries. Medium Soft Drink or Iced Tea.
The All-American Sonic Smasher is a new, limited-time variant of the Sonic Smasher, featuring two made-to-order, smashed Angus beef patties served with American cheese, shredded lettuce, tomato, crinkle-cut pickles, diced onions, ketchup, and mayo on a soft potato bun. It is also available as the All-American Triple Sonic Smasher (with three beef patties), All-American Bacon Sonic Smasher (with bacon), and the All-American Triple Bacon Sonic Smasher (with three beef patties and bacon). Other limited-time menu items at Sonic right now include:
Cherry Flavor Bubble Slush - A cherry slush with blue raspberry flavor bubbles. Green Apple Flavor Bubble Slush - A green apple slush with blue raspberry flavor bubbles. Salted Caramel Toffee Croissant Bites - Flaky Croissant Bites tossed in salted caramel and toffee sugar.
Photo via Sonic. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Reveals New Luxe Value Menu
entry.summary:
Taco Bell is updating its Cravings Value Menu and renaming it the new Luxe Value Menu starting January 22, 2026. Taco Bell Rewards Members get early access to the new menu now when ordering through the Taco Bell mobile app or website.
The Luxe Value Menu features 10 items priced at $3 or less, including five new dishes. The new items include: - New Mini Taco Salad (suggested price of $2.49) - A crispy tortilla bowl filled with seasoned beef, creamy Chipotle Sauce, cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, and refried beans. - New Beefy Potato Loaded Griller (suggested price of $2.49) - Seasoned ground beef, Creamy Chipotle Sauce, nacho cheese sauce, reduced-fat sour cream, and crispy potato bites, wrapped up in a flour tortilla and grilled. - New Chips & Nacho Supreme Dip (suggested price of $2.49) - Layers of seasoned beef, refried beans, nacho cheese sauce, reduced-fat sour cream, pico de gallo, and a three-cheese blend, served with tortilla chips. - New Avocado Ranch Chicken Stacker (suggested price of $2.99) - Grilled white-meat chicken, Avocado Ranch Sauce, three-cheese blend, lettuce, and tomatoes, folded in a flour tortilla and grilled. - New, limited-time Salted Caramel Churros (suggested price of $1.99) - Three churros with a creamy filling, dusted in salted caramel sugar. Returning on the value menu are: - Cheesy Roll Up for a suggested price of $1.19. - Spicy Potato Soft Taco for a suggested price of $1.29. - Cheesy Bean and Rice Burrito for a suggested price of $1.49. - 3 Cheese Chicken Flatbread Melt for a suggested price of $2.29. - Cheesy Double Beef Burrito for a suggested price of $2.79. As a promotion for the updated value menu, on January 27, 2026, at 2PM, Taco Bell will be holding a Tuesday Drop where the first 30,000 rewards members can claim a Luxe Value Menu item for $1. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme Welcomes Winter Seasonal Collection Donuts
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme introduces its new Winter Seasonal Collection of four donuts for the 2025-2026 winter.
The winter lineup includes:
- Caramel Dulce Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in caramel icing with a salted caramel dulce drizzle. - Chocolate Truffle Donut - A donut filled with chocolate truffle-flavored Kreme, dipped in chocolate icing, decorated with drizzles of chocolate icing, and finished with chocolate chips. - Raspberry Cheesecake Donut - A donut dipped in raspberry-flavored icing and graham crunch, topped with a rosette of cheesecake-flavored buttercreme. - Cinnamon Sugar Cake Donut - An Original Glazed, cinnamon old-fashioned cake donut. Krispy Kreme also offers two seasonal beverages this winter: the Caramel Vanilla Latte and the Caramel Brown Sugar Latte. Both are available hot, iced, or frozen. Krispy Kreme's Winter Seasonal Collection is available now for a limited time at participating locations across the US. Additionally, from January 16 through January 19, 2026, Kripsy Kreme is offering a deal where you can get a dozen Original Glazed donuts for $1 with the price of any regular-priced dozen. When ordering online, you'll need to use the code "BOGO1". Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: KFC - Spicy Zinger Sandwich
entry.summary:
KFC's Spicy Zinger Sandwich features a new Extra Crispy Spicy Zinger marinated chicken breast filet served with shredded Romaine lettuce and the Colonel's Mayo on a toasted brioche bun. It's a test item here in California.
I bought one for $6.49. I think my local KFC was still working out the kinks on making this (or they just didn't have lettuce on hand), as mine came with pickles instead of lettuce. I didn't mind it as lettuce on a hot chicken sandwich tends to wilt quickly, while pickles add a nice crunch and acidity. In terms of texture, the new chicken filet felt the same as KFC's regular Extra Crispy chicken breast filet. Mine felt like it had been sitting in the warmer for a while, but it was thick, relatively tender, and moist inside and flaky and crispy outside.
Flavor-wise, there was a light seasoned flavor and a respectable amount of medium heat. It was spicy enough to get my nose running, but not so much that I went reaching for milk. It's probably as spicy as you're going to get at a major fast-food chain that isn't dishing Buffalo wings. The bun was a little stale. It was still moist inside, but the crust was somewhat hardened and dry. Overall, KFC's Spicy Zinger Sandwich was pretty good and even better if you can get a fresh one. I enjoyed the heat, and I prefer a spicy chicken filet over a spicy sauce. Note - Sorry, there's no cross-section shot for this review. I cut the sandwich and set up the shot, but then had a brain fart and didn't take a picture. Nutritional Info - KFC Spicy Zinger Sandwich Calories - 480 Fat - 23g (Saturated Fat - 3g) Sodium - 1360mg Carbs - 37g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 33g Read more at Brand Eating!
